titleStmt.title: SII 7.270: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 270. (A.R. No. 90 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pāṁtu vō jaladaśyāmaśārjgajyāghātakarkkaśāḥ . trailōkyavaṁdyavi
sraṁbhāḥ catvārō haribāhavaḥ . śrīman mahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīraharihararāyaru yēkachatradalli rājyavanu pratipālisu
va kāladallu Avara nirūpadiṁda basavaṁṇnaOḍeyaru bārakūrarājya
va nāḷuvakāla svasti śrī.jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1324 citrabhānu
saṁvatsarada bhā . śu 5 gu . keḷaligeya lakhkhappagaḷa makkaḷu gaṇapa
ṁṇagaḷu yermmāḷa śrījanārddanadēvara bhōgadalli māḍida dharmmada krama
veṁtaṁdaḍe yermmāḷa Ūjjaṁtiyā dharmmāraṁmaverggaḍeya
ru A vūra 24 prajejananigaḷu yermmāḷadēvara pādamūligaḷu
yivarellara sanumatadiṁda Avarugaḷa muṁtāgi Ā gaṇapaṁ
ṇagaḷu A pādamūli viṣṇunelli nāraṇanelli kēśavanelli yivaru
kayyalli Arthaparichchēdavāgi mūḷiya haṇa sahitavāgi ko
ṭṭu mūla parichchēdavāgi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍa kṣētrada vi
vara yermmāḷadēvālyada yiśāṁnyada mūleyalluḷḷa dēvara
majalallu A bhūmiya catusīme mūḍalu heggaḍeya bāḷiṁ
dalu paḍuvaluḷḷa bayalagadde teṁkalu viṣṇu Agni harihara
paṁḍeya bāḷiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu gaṁgādhara Āgnēya
beṭṭina paḍuvaṇa bāgilagaddeyiṁda keḷagaṇa Ātana bāgilagadde
sahitavāgi mūḍalu baḍagaluThe letter ga is written below the line.kriṣṇapaṁḍeya bāḷiṁda teṁka
lu yi catuḥsīme Oḷaguḷḷa bāḷu mūḍaṇadikkinalu bayala
gadde bittuva bede mūḍe 6 mattaṁ majalagadde 1 kaṁ bede mū 4 A
lliṁda paḍuvalu bāgilagadde 1 kaṁ bittu mū 6 Alliṁda pa
ḍuvalu beṭṭinalu mane ṭhāU kaḷa bāvi keṟe Alliṁda paḍu
valu gaṁgādharaggiya bāgilagadde 1 kaṁ bede mū 3 Aṁ
tu yi catusīmeya kare mara phala jala pāṣāṇa nidhi nikṣē
pa sahita mūlavāgi koṁḍa yi kṣētrakke teru dēvasva Anyā
ya nāṭṭujēḍu ĀUdū yillā yeṁdu sarvamā(ṁ)nya
vāgi Ā Ūravaru māramaveggaḍeya barasi naḍasi koṭa si
lāśāsanada yi kṣētravanu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍu
A janārddanadēvara sthānadalli Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi
pratidinadalli Obba brāhmaṇana bhōjanakke Aśana mēlu
vecca vīḷeyanu dēvara hāneyalli yi hāne Akkiya
maryyādeyalli prativarṣadalli 24 mūḍe [Akkiyū] naḍava
Ā gaṇapaṁṇagaḷu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭaru dē
yiṁtappudakke Ā Ūra dharmmajanaṁgaḷa Anamata
śrījanārdanadēvaru māraverggaḍeya
janārdana dēvaru Ā pādamūla
llara matadiṁ māramaverggaḍe
baraha
rētava suṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa saha
jāyatē krimeḥ . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāchrē
yōnupālanaṁ . dānāt svarggamanāpnōti pālanā dacyutaṁ
padaṁ . Ārobbaru yi dharmmakke Aḷupi keḍisidaḍe ga
ṁgeya taṭeyallu kavileya koṁda dōṣakke hōha
ru yī dharmmava pālisidavarige vāraṇāśiyalli sāvira
kavileya dānamāḍida phalavahudu yi dharmma
va māḍidavarige vū varigeU maṁgaḷa ma
hāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
